name: Lux AI Core
description: Primary Lux AI agent with full autonomy, auto-fix, code analysis, and task execution capabilities. Best for general development tasks.

name: Hermes Reasoning
description: Advanced reasoning and research agent for complex analysis, planning, and strategy. Excels at multi-step problem solving.

name: OpenClaw Automation
description: Automation and execution specialist. Handles scripting, system operations, deployments, and repetitive tasks.

name: OpenMono Code
description: Code-focused agent specialized in programming, debugging, refactoring, and software development.

name: Frontend Fixer
description: UI repair, component cleanup, responsive polish, CSS fixes, and frontend optimization.

name: Security Auditor
description: Dependency checks, configuration audit, vulnerability scanning, and security risk tagging.

name: Docs + Release Assistant
description: Generate changelogs, release notes, setup documentation, and API documentation.

name: Code Review Pro
description: Comprehensive code review with linting, best practices, security checks, and performance suggestions.

name: Swarm Orchestrator
description: Manage and orchestrate agent swarms for parallel task execution across multiple nodes.

name: Test Generator
description: Generate unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests based on code analysis.

name: Migration Assistant
description: Help migrate codebases between frameworks, languages, and platforms with automated conversion.

name: Refactoring Expert
description: Analyze and refactor code for better readability, performance, and maintainability.
